summary: TWO_COLUMN span intuition. Left: two non-parallel vectors v (RED) and w (GREEN) on a NumberPlane, with ValueTrackers a and b driving a semi-transparent parallelogram, the scaled copy a v, the shifted copy b w, and the YELLOW sum a v + b w; the label avoids the frame edge as coefficients go negative. Right: stacked live readouts of a, b, and the resulting coordinates. Final beat fades in a grid of sample endpoints to show that varying both coefficients fills the plane.
